parsed_output.justification: Carly claims to be the Troublemaker and states she switched the cards of Paul and Mitchell, subsequently identifying Mitchell as the Werewolf. Mike, claiming to be the Seer, states he saw a Werewolf and a Tanner in the center, which implies only one Werewolf/Minion is currently in play among the players. Since Carly's switch makes Mitchell the current holder of the Werewolf card (assuming Paul started as the Werewolf), Mitchell is the most logical target for Team Village.
